task: Input: Monolayer epitaxial graphene samples and mid-infrared pump excitation parameters (wavelength: 5 μm, intensity, polarization angle). Output: Direct, energy- and momentum-resolved observation of Floquet-Bloch states (replica bands of the Dirac cone) via time-resolved and angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (tr-ARPES). Scientific Goal: To experimentally confirm the existence of Floquet-Bloch states in a paradigmatic 2D material and elucidate the underlying scattering mechanism involving photon-dressed Volkov final states.

data.name: raw_trARPES_data.h5
data.description: Raw, unprocessed 4D data arrays (energy, momentum kx/ky, time delay) from the tr-ARPES experiment.

data.name: processed_band_data.json
data.description: Processed data containing the extracted positions and intensities of the main Dirac cone and replica bands.

data.name: polarization_dependence_data.csv
data.description: Tabular data containing the measured intensity of the replica band for each pump polarization angle (θp).
